prompts.square:
GENERATE A BACKGROUND
Abstract geometric background inspired by a modern sail or forward motion shape, using deep navy #012072 as the dominant base with layered bold blue #0037BE, bright blue #0063F2, mint green #8BD8BD, and a bright orange #F49F1C accent.

Clean, overlapping angular panels with smooth, blended transitions and a very soft, fine-grained texture. Composition should frame the edges and corners, leaving a calm, open negative space in the center for text placement. Professional, training-focused, confident corporate style. No white, no glow, no light beams, no dark vignette, no clutter. Balanced contrast to support overlay text.

OVERLAY TEXT
Add the text "AI WORKSHOP: CODE AND AUTOMATE WITH AI".

OVERLAY ELEMENTS
A photorealistic and diverse group of people walking out of a corridor, facing the camera with layered shapes, light, or visual panels that feel like progress markers. Add a prominent symbol that represents the training program as a whole, almost like a logo or icon.

STRICT OVERLAY RULES
Focus on placing text and elements in the center of the image.

STRICT AVOIDANCE RULES
* Avoid the top and bottom 25% of the image
* Visual cliches like AI brains and circuits.
* Imagery that anthropomorphizes AI.

prompts.square:
Abstract geometric background inspired by a modern sail or sense of forward motion, filling the entire image. Bright blue #0063F2 as the dominant base with layered shapes of bold blue #0037BE, mint green #8BD8BD, orange #F49F1C, and subtle deep navy #012072 accents.

Design should feel light, airy, and background-oriented. Shapes should appear semi-transparent with low opacity, softly blended into one another. Use reduced contrast and slightly desaturated colors so the composition remains calm and unobtrusive.

Clean overlapping angular panels with very soft edges and smooth gradients. Extremely subtle layering and depth, with a faint fine-grained texture.

Maintain a quiet visual hierarchy so the background does not compete with foreground text or imagery. No sharp edges, no high contrast areas, no focal point. The composition should feel soft, diffused, and atmospheric.
